ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER_POWER.title: Attack Register (RA)
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER_POWER.smartD: #Can be [gold]Read[/gold] and [gold]Written[/gold] to by attack cards. Current Read: Deals {Amount} extra damage.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER_POWER.title: Defense Register (RD)
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER_POWER.smart: #Can be [gold]Read[/gold] and [gold]Written[/gold] to by defense cards. Current Read: Grants {Amount} extra Block.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER_POWER.title: Draw Register (RP)
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER_POWER.smartDes: #Can be [gold]Read[/gold] and [gold]Written[/gold] to by draw cards. Current Read: Draws {Amount} extra cards.
ASTROLUPINE-TROJAN_HORSE_VIRUS_POWER.sma: #At the start of the player's turn, takes damage equal to the player's [gold]Attack Register[/gold] value. Lasts {Amount} turns.
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_EXPLOIT_POWER.title: Zero-Day Exploit
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE_POWER.title: Auto Maintenance
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE_POWER.smart: #At the start of your turn, gain Block equal to the current [gold]Defense Register[/gold] value. Lasts {Amount} turns.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_ACCUMULATOR_POWER.sma: #At the start of your turn, [gold]Attack Register[/gold] increases by {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_ACCUMULATOR_POWER.sm: #At the start of your turn, [gold]Defense Register[/gold] increases by {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE_POWER.title: Attack Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE_POWER.smart: #At the start of your next turn, sets the [gold]Attack Register[/gold] value to {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_OVERWRITE_POWER.smar: #At the start of your next turn, sets the [gold]Defense Register[/gold] value to {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE_POWER.title: Draw Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE_POWER.smartDe: #At the start of your next turn, sets the [gold]Draw Register[/gold] value to {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-KERNEL_HARDENING_POWER.title: Kernel Hardening
ASTROLUPINE-KERNEL_HARDENING_POWER.smart: #Attack and Defense register values cannot drop below {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING_POWER.sma: #Whenever a register's value changes, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET_POWER.title: Botnet
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET_POWER.smartDescriptio: #At the start of your turn, for each layer of [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] on all enemies, gain {Amount} Block.
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE_POWER.s: #At the start of your turn, if the [gold]Attack Register[/gold] is at least !Magic!, draw {Amount} cards.
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY_POWER.title: Exploit Anomaly
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY_POWER.smartD: #At the start of your turn, if you have an Overwrite effect for any register, gain {Amount} Energy and draw {Amount} cards.
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION_POWER.title: Lupine Intuition
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION_POWER.smart: #Whenever an enemy is inflicted with [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] or [gold]Zero-Day Exploit[/gold], gain {Amount} Block.
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING_POWER.sm: #The values of all registers are doubled when [gold]Read[/gold].
ASTROLUPINE-PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION_POWER.s: #Whenever you play an Attack card, [gold]Write[/gold] its damage value to the [gold]Attack Register[/gold]. Triggers {Amount} times.
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK_POWER.title: Read-Only Lock
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK_POWER.smartDe: #All registers are locked, cannot be written to, only read. Lasts {Amount} turns.
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING_POWER.title: Deep Learning
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING_POWER.smartDes: #Whenever you play a card with [gold]Read[/gold] or [gold]Write[/gold], deal {Amount} damage to a random enemy.
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM_POWER.s: #The first [gold]Write[/gold] card you play each turn writes double its value.
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH_POWER.title: Knowledge Graph
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH_POWER.smartD: #At the start of your turn, add {Amount} cards from your draw pile to your hand; they gain [gold]Write[/gold] this turn.
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL_POWER.s: #Whenever you gain any [gold]Overwrite Effect[/gold], the [gold]Attack Register[/gold] and [gold]Defense Register[/gold] immediately increase by the same value as the Overwrite Effect.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_POWER.title: Root Access
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_POWER.smartDescription: #[gold]Read[/gold] effects for your [gold]Attack[/gold] and [gold]Defense Registers[/gold] will read the higher value between the two.
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE_POWER.title: Sandbox Mode
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE_POWER.smartDesc: #For this turn, your [gold]Write[/gold] effects no longer change register values, but instead grant [gold]Overwrite Effect[/gold] equal to {Amount} times the written value.
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE_POWER.title: Turing Complete
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE_POWER.smartD: #Whenever you play a card with both [gold]Read[/gold] and [gold]Write[/gold], draw {Amount} cards.
#[gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] stacks no longer decrease over time, but instead increase by {Amount} each turn.
